'''Eyar Treatment Systems''' was a company contracted to clean and maintain the underground [[Eyar City Sewer|sewers]] of [[Eyar City]]. The sewers were often left unclean, as Eyar Treatment Systems was often underfunded by the government. Eyar Treatment Systems employed a number of [[Technician/Legends|technicians]] and utilized [[GH Maintenance Droid]]s.<ref name="HS" />
